{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603231855264CD1558C5A1C33EAD026\"}"},"total":7457},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7098676850284757792","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一部十分专业而且很让人入迷的医道小说，作者中医知识博学，专业理论深厚，对中医治病从理论到处方，病情病症条分缕析深入浅出，让人十分信服。小说塑造了一个中医院硕士生苏子阳，学校毕业后是从多个老师拜师学艺的全过程，着力刻划了苏子阳的天资聪敏学习刻苦的精神，最后成为一代中医大家。小说文笔流畅，表述精彩，情节曲折生动引人入胜。小说主人公没有所谓的奇遇、得道和上天眷顾，完全凭机遇和自己的不懈努力，获得高超的中医治病能力。小说从另一个方面也充分证明了中医的博大精深和因病施治的强大功效。小说没有低俗的描写，作者满满的正能量，这是一部非常出色的小说，谢谢作者！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1652789587,"group_id":"7028204375155674147","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwAZ1jSnEuAnEOjL2iV3wMc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788850\u0026x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"55905204908","user_name":"九塔的唐书雁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"55905204908","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7028204375155674147","book_info":{"abstract":"一个普通中医大学的研究生毕业之后，没有进入医院，进入到一家道医馆工作，对工作之中一些奇症怪病的见闻记录。（本文医案真实，但是药方不可私自乱用，看病请找正规的医院和中医师)（如果真正喜欢中医，请耐心阅读，相信本书会给你一个不一样的感觉。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6b6156406a88d83bf8ea2a8b81a9c166","author":"苓安","author_id":"","book_id":"7028204375155674147","book_name":"道医苏子阳","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"26.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize ial_count":"393","tags":"都市修真,都市,神医","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/724905197747aaa0decbe8a59a1eb305~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779447326\u0026x-signature=qXo9DUr7w92Qd9NYW4r1caMmotw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"135982932834525","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.5344556e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603231855264CD1558C5A1C33EAD026\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":111,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15344,"reply_count":21,"show_pv":57704},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1646679437,"author_reply_time":1640836940,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7133954597336941327","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书写的很好很好，超精彩及实用性。若有人说是不好，说明此人不懂医，不明内含。能看出作者是用心写的，实质性很高。正义是社会主流，是人类共性。奉献是正能量，依每个人的奉献能量，利益多少人为贡献点，也是每个人的人生价值。人人都在修行，只是道德观点不同，选择行业不同巴了。但其意义及果报千差万别。愿天下人都健康幸福，愿古中医大放光明，解脱无量无边的众生。善哉善哉，赞👍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1661003288,"group_id":"7028204375155674147","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/ABTdPAPirF62TCQD841i0gsOusTo/2/Y/3Df7Qnmqd","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788850\u0026x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"2260241828036910","user_name":"惭愧僧常惭愧，"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2260241828036910","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_
